_comment: Day 1 X mirror queue entry. publish-next-day.ts prepends this to scripts/social-brief/x-mirror-queue.json on publish day. The bskyUri label is informational; the resolveable matchSubstring is what the apply script searches for.
matchSubstring: Bill C-22 passed second reading April 20
text:
Bill C-22 passed second reading April 20.

→ 1 year metadata retention
→ Secret order power for Public Safety
→ Lower access threshold

Opposed: Geist, EFF, Meta, Apple, US House Judiciary.
